updates.tweet_text:

updates.tweet_text: @chrisAn00930062 @ES_Money_Print Its extremely clear. I wrote the newsletter Friday at 4pm. At this point 7585 was just a normal unactionable support. On Sunday at 6pm we held it and set a very clear *significant low*. This is the primary criteria for a Failed Breakdown. We swept that low this AM and recovered.
updates.notes: 7585 is in morning plan; tweet is hindsight explanation of FBD criteria already triggered, not a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text: @chrisAn00930062 @ES_Money_Print At 7585 at 6pm Sunday we set a low and rallied to 7620. That would meet criteria 1 (being the Sunday daily low) and 2. That makes it an A+ Failed Breakdown https://t.co/IDURhbdXo5

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: We got our 20 minutes of volatility burst this morning and as always, it setup a Failed Breakdown of 7585 (Sunday opening low) then probably days of grind again. 7605 now support. Newsletter out soon with next entries from here
